profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk provides enterprise resource planning software solutions under the RUN System brand name for various business processes in Southeast Asia. The company provides various solutions for cost control, cash flow management, asset management, enterprise accounting, account payable, and account receivable; sales management, international trade logistics, and distribution management; and purchasing management, contract management, raw material purchasing, and e-procurement. It also offers material management, warehouse management system, and inventory management; production management, production planning, capacity planning, and material requirement planning; and performance, organization, assessment, training, and recruitment management services. In addition, the company provides custom application development, professional, and information technology services. It serves the manufacturing, construction, mining and quarrying, financial services, agriculture and forestry, industrial park, property, professional services, and tourism and hospitality sectors. PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Yogyakarta, Indonesia.
